reviews.comment:
Unica estacion de servicio en Cachi, a tener en cuenta cuando vengan, tuvimos la suerte de no poder cargar combustible por 3 dias, se rompio un surtidor y el tecnico no vino nunca a repararlo, el encargado de la estacion lo reparo via llamada por celular UN CAPO.

(Translated by Google)
The only gas station in Cachi, keep in mind when you come, we were lucky enough not to be able to refuel for 3 days, a pump broke and the technician never came to repair it, the station manager fixed it via cell phone call, A GENIUS.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNGelpIT0pREAE
